title: INERRA Chiffon Ribbon - Luxury Wired Edge 20 Metres x 50mm - (Baby Pink)
features: Available in a range of colours
Features wired edges to hold its shape
description: Product Description 20 Metre Rolls The width of the ribbon is 2" (50mm). Chiffon ribbon for a whole variety of arts and crafts uses. Ideal for floral, craft and weddings uses, this wired edge chiffon ribbon is ideal for wedding cars. Use for making bows as well as decorating hampers and baskets. Can also be used for decorating Christmas trees and decorating wreaths. Features Wired Edges Made from organza material, perfect for decorating homes and offices. Great to add on any tree skirt or wreath, run across a mantle, make bows and use to package gifts
